---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new component or feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
<!-- What feature or component do you want to add? -->

## Use Case
<!-- Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How should it work? Describe the behavior and API -->

## Example Usage
```jsx
// Show how the component/feature would be used
<NewComponent prop="value">
  Content
</NewComponent>
```

## Component Props (if applicable)
<!-- List the props the component should accept -->

- `prop1`: description
- `prop2`: description

## Variants/Options (if applicable)
<!-- List any variants or options -->

- variant1
- variant2

## Design Reference
<!-- Optional: Add links to similar components or designs -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- What other solutions did you consider? Why is this approach better? -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups -->

## Willing to Contribute?
<!-- Are you willing to work on this feature? -->

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to work on this
- [ ] No, just suggesting
